sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section III, List of Answers on Terminology 66:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section III, List of Answers on Terminology 66:1
items.html: Intermittent illumination is called “nesting.” It is like birds that lie in their nests intermittently when they want to have fledglings, and afterwards leave. (Part 3, Chapter 4, item 4)
